overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a medieval Gothic-style classroom or great hall from a video game, featuring students in robes studying at wooden desks beneath tall arched windows and iron chandeliers. The scene remains completely stationary throughout the clip with no camera movement or action.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand medieval classroom hall with Gothic architecture, featuring wooden desks, stone walls, and tall arched windows. Students in blue robes sit reading at their desks while natural light filters through the windows, illuminating the iron chandeliers and ornate door at the far end of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand medieval classroom that maintains a consistent atmosphere of scholarly stillness. It begins with a wide perspective of the Gothic hall, where natural light filters through tall arched windows to illuminate the stone walls and iron chandeliers. As the eye wanders through the space, the focus settles on students in blue robes quietly reading at their wooden desks. The scene remains poised and unchanging, finally drawing the gaze toward the ornate door at the far end of the room.
